overall.description: First-person exploration of a post-apocalyptic urban wasteland engulfed in green toxic haze. The player walks slowly through ruined streets lined with dead trees and crumbling concrete buildings, surveying the desolate environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined urban street in toxic wasteland

agents.ego_description: walking slowly forward through the toxic haze, surveying the devastated urban landscape

tilted metal street lamp with broken fixture
damaged multi-story concrete building with missing walls
cluster of dead trees with bare branches
silhouettes of ruined buildings obscured by green haze

segments.scene_description: The player moves slowly through a desolate post-apocalyptic street engulfed in thick green toxic haze. A broken wooden fence lines the left side while a tilted street lamp stands on the right, with ruined concrete buildings and dead trees visible through the fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, steady progression through a desolate urban wasteland submerged in a thick, toxic green haze. It begins with a forward movement along a ruined street, where the oppressive fog obscures the surrounding decay. As the camera advances, a broken wooden fence emerges on the left while a tilted street lamp looms on the right. The scene then reveals the skeletal remains of dead trees and crumbling concrete buildings that gradually materialize through the shifting green mist.
